summary: Iteration 112: Mixology R&D Lab - Backend 22/22 tests PASSED (100%). Full flavor profiling with 40+ ingredients, 25 recipes (20 alcoholic + 5 non-alcoholic), taste-based search, and custom recipe analyzer all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: INGREDIENTS dict has 40+ items with full chemistry (ABV, sugar_g_per_oz, acid_g_per_oz, bitterness, flavor_tags)
TASTE_MAP correctly maps 5 taste types (sweet, sour, bitter, salty, umami) with receptor locations and cocktail examples
RECIPE_DB has exactly 25 recipes: 20 alcoholic + 5 non-alcoholic as specified
Non-alcoholic recipes correctly have gl_account='4100' (Food Cost) hardcoded
Alcoholic recipes correctly get gl_account='4200 - Beverage Cost' via _cost_recipe function
Old Fashioned taste_profile verified: sweet:2, sour:0, bitter:4
Margarita taste_profile verified: sweet:3, sour:5, bitter:1
Taste search uses Euclidean distance for matching - Pier Two Signature is perfect match for sweet:4, sour:3, bitter:0
Sazerac uses lemon_peel which is NOT in INGREDIENTS dict - _cost_recipe handles gracefully with default fallback cost
Custom recipe analyzer correctly calculates ABV, sugar/acid chemistry, bitterness index, and balance score 0-100
Balance scoring penalizes: too sweet without acid (-20), bitter without sweetener (-20), ABV>25% (-10), volume<60ml (-10)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - all data is hardcoded in INGREDIENTS, TASTE_MAP, and RECIPE_DB dicts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 112 tested Mixology R&D Lab. All endpoints working: GET /api/mixology-rd/ingredients (40+ ingredients with chemistry), GET /api/mixology-rd/taste-map (5 taste types with balance rules), GET /api/mixology-rd/recipes (25 recipes with full costing), GET /api/mixology-rd/recipes?type_filter=non_alcoholic (5 recipes with GL 4100), GET /api/mixology-rd/recipes?category=whiskey (filters by category), GET /api/mixology-rd/recipes/{recipe_name} (single recipe detail), GET /api/mixology-rd/search/by-taste (taste-based search with Euclidean distance), POST /api/mixology-rd/recipes/analyze (custom recipe analyzer with ABV, chemistry, balance score, GL routing).
